id.description: Unique identifier of the Feature Flag.

slug.description: A unique key to reference the Feature Flag.

name.description: A descriptive name for the Feature Flag. This field does not need to be unique.

description.description: A description for the Feature Flag.

owner.description: The owner of the Feature Flag.

email.description: The email address of the flag owner.

first_name.description: The first name of the flag owner.

last_name.description: The last name of the flag owner.

tags.description: Labels assigned to the Feature Flag for categorizing and filtering.

enabled.description: Specifies whether the Feature Flag is active for the current environment.

default_value.description: The value returned for users and organizations who don't match any configured targeting rules.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.
